description: Hatharin Kandambige Sagara Sampath Vs The Hon. Attorney General, before Hon.Amal Ranaraja, J.
parties: Hatharin Kandambige Sagara Sampath Vs The Hon. Attorney General,
keywords: Rape – Imperfect recollection of events by witness does not detract from overall credibility of the statement – Exception to the inadmissibility of hearsay evidence – The test of probability – Credibility of witness’s narration – Rejection of Accused’s dock statement
